goal: Deprecation stub on vendor /project-market route after task 70-01 moved marketplace to apps/platform. Replace the moved vendor/get-anything-done/site/app/project-market/page.tsx with a server-rendered deprecation message: 'The marketplace has moved to the platform app.' + install/run CLI snippet (pnpm --filter @portfolio/platform dev) + a link to the new /marketplace URL. Match the pattern used by existing /planning and /projects deprecation stubs in the vendor site (decision gad-269). No component imports, just a single file.
